concepts.en_name: National Enterprise Credit Information Publicity System (NECIPS)
concepts.jp_name: 国家企業信用情報公示システム
concepts.definition: 国家市場監督管理総局が運営する企業信用情報公開プラットフォーム（gsxt.gov.cn）。全中国企業の基本情報を最も権威ある形で即時に提供。2020年5月時点で累計訪問数1268.85億回、照会数108.16億回。
concepts.context_quote: The National enterprise credit information publicity system is developed and run by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) of China... cumulative number of visits to the system has reached 126.885 billion

concepts.jp_name: 国家市場監督管理総局
concepts.definition: 中国の企業登記主管機関であり、全企業の情報を保有。国家企業信用情報公示システムを開発・運営。
concepts.context_quote: As the competent company registration authority in China, SAMR holds all the company's information

concepts.definition: NECIPSを通じた企業の存続状態確認。「存続中」「取消（営業許可取消）」「抹消（登記抹消）」等の状態を即時確認可能。
concepts.context_quote: you can know its status, such as existence, revocation, or deregistration

relationships.target: National Enterprise Credit Information Publicity System (NECIPS)

relationships.source: National Enterprise Credit Information Publicity System (NECIPS)
relationships.description: NECIPSが企業状態確認機能を提供
